REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-28-2011. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DESIREE DAHDAH, THE DEFENDANT'S DAUGHTER. MS. DAHDAH REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT, HER FATHER, PASSED AWAY. AFTER THE MATTER WAS PASSED FOR PARTIES TO MEET IN THE HALL AND RECALLED, JUDGMENT WAS FILED IN COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
